site.name: Lydia Zhigmitova
site.tagline: Making AI accurate, verifiable, and useful.
site.description: AI-visibility audits, chatbot testing, AI help systems, document automation, and content fact-checking — making AI accurate, verifiable, and useful for your business.
site.author: Lydia Zhigmitova

about.intro: I help businesses make AI accurate and verifiable — testing AI systems, structuring content so it holds up, and checking every claim against its source before it reaches a customer.
about.mission: Make AI outputs accurate, verifiable, and genuinely useful, with a person accountable for what ships.

values.title: Accuracy
values.description: Every claim is checked against source material before it ships

values.title: Verifiability
values.description: Answers cite their source, so anyone can trace where they came from

values.title: Restraint
values.description: A dependable AI system declines to answer rather than guess

values.title: Clarity
values.description: Short reports on what is wrong and how to fix it, not walls of output

about.experience: Focused on AI visibility, chatbot quality, AI help systems, document automation, and fact-checking for AI-generated content.

faq.question: How do engagements usually work?
faq.answer: Most clients start with a fixed-scope project — an AI-visibility audit, a chatbot test report, a document-automation build, or a batch of content to fact-check. From there, some move to ongoing work, such as maintaining an AI help system or a monthly editing bundle.

faq.question: How long does a project take?
faq.answer: Most projects turn around in a few business days once scope is clear. Larger builds, such as an AI help system, take longer. I confirm timing before any work begins.

faq.question: What do you guarantee?
faq.answer: That the work is accurate, verifiable, and delivered on time. Every claim in content is checked against source material, and the AI assistants I build answer only from verified content. I cannot guarantee inclusion in AI-generated answers, rankings, or sales — no honest provider can.

faq.question: Are ongoing plans locked in?
faq.answer: No. Maintenance and monthly bundles are month-to-month with no lock-in contract. You can cancel any time, and pricing stays fixed and predictable.

hero.title: Make AI accurate, verifiable, and useful.
hero.subtitle: I test, structure, and verify AI systems and content — so buyers can find you through AI search, your assistants answer correctly, and everything you publish holds up.

services.title: AI-Visibility Audit & Optimization
services.summary: Get cited when buyers ask AI instead of a search engine.
services.description: Buyers increasingly ask ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity the questions they used to type into search engines. This service tests 20–30 questions your buyers are likely to ask, identifies where your brand is absent from the answers, and restructures your content into the fact-dense formats these platforms favor when choosing sources to cite. No provider can guarantee inclusion in AI-generated answers, but well-structured content measurably improves the likelihood of being cited.
services.forWhom: Brands that want to be discoverable through AI search, not only traditional search engines.

services.title: Chatbot Testing & Quality Report
services.summary: Find where your chatbot fails before your customers do.
services.description: For businesses running an AI assistant, this service puts it through 50–100 realistic test questions, scores each response, and delivers a report that pinpoints failure points, their root causes, and recommended fixes. You see the weak spots before a customer encounters them directly.
services.forWhom: Businesses operating a live chatbot, and agencies that build chatbots for clients.

services.title: AI Help System — Build & Maintain
services.summary: A branded help center that answers only from verified content.
services.description: This service consolidates scattered customer information — social media replies, email threads, informal FAQs — into a structured, branded help center. An AI assistant is then layered on top, answering questions using only verified source content, citing where each answer comes from, and declining to answer rather than guessing when the information is unavailable.
services.forWhom: Brands and clinics whose staff repeatedly answer the same customer questions.

services.title: Document Automation
services.summary: Automate one repetitive document task, with a human check.
services.description: Most businesses have at least one repetitive document task quietly consuming staff time — turning inbound enquiries into structured records, summarizing supplier documentation, or generating label and listing copy from product data. This service builds a reliable, automated pipeline for one such task, with a verification step so flagged discrepancies are reviewed by a person before anything reaches a customer.
services.forWhom: Teams performing the same manual document task on a recurring basis.

services.title: Editing & Fact-Checking for AI-Generated Content
services.summary: Verify every claim in AI-drafted content before it ships.
services.description: AI-generated drafts are fast to produce but prone to factual errors and inconsistent tone. This service verifies every claim in AI-drafted content against source material, corrects tone and voice, and prepares the result for publication.
services.forWhom: Teams producing content with AI that need a verification step before publishing.

pricing.value: from $30 per piece, or a monthly bundle rate

guarantees: AI assistants I build answer only from verified content — and decline rather than guess
Every claim in AI-drafted content is checked against source material
Reports name the failure points, their root causes, and the recommended fixes
No promises of AI-answer inclusion, rankings, or sales — only accurate, verifiable work
